description: The microsoft.dynamics365.finance.receivable connector provides access to Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance Receivable entities via the OData REST API.
key-features: Manage receivable entities in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance
Support for list, create, read, update, and delete operations
communication-scenario: Connecting to Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance Receivable API
client-init: receivable:Client cl = check new ({auth: {tokenUrl, clientId, clientSecret}}, serviceUrl);
